examples.name: Live device output

Name                             Default RD            Interfaces
  BLUE                             65000:200             Lo20
                                                         Gi2.20
                                                         Gi3.20
  RED                              65000:100             Lo10
                                                         Gi2.10
                                                         Gi3.10

examples.name: Multiple VRFs with one having many interfaces
examples.input:
Name                         Default RD            Interfaces
Mgmt-intf                    <not set>             Gi1
VRF1                         65000:1               Tu1
                                                   Lo300
                                                   Gi2.390
                                                   Gi2.410
                                                   Gi2.415
                                                   Gi2.420
                                                   Gi3.390
                                                   Gi3.410
                                                   Gi3.415
                                                   Gi3.420
                                                   Tu3
                                                   Tu4
                                                   Tu6
                                                   Tu8

examples.name: Single VRF with many interfaces (filtered output)
examples.input:
Name                             Default RD          Interfaces
VRF1                         65000:1                 Tu1
                                                     Lo300
                                                     Gi2.390
                                                     Tu3

examples.input:
Name                             Default RD            Interfaces
Mgmt-intf                        <not set>             Gi1
